title: Customer Stories
body: Teams around the world use Zyplo to ship better software.
Here are some real stories from our customers.

title: Startup Team
body: A small startup used Zyplo to organize their sprint workflow.
They reduced planning time by 40% and shipped faster.

title: Enterprise Team
body: A large enterprise adopted Zyplo across multiple teams.
They improved visibility and cross-team collaboration.

title: Remote Company
body: A fully remote company used Zyplo to stay aligned across time zones.
They replaced multiple tools with a single workflow in Zyplo.
